mapper.select: SELECT GRADE_NAME, MIN_LEVEL, MAX_LEVEL FROM LQ_GRADE_RANGE ORDER BY NVL(MIN_LEVEL, 1) ASC, NVL(MAX_LEVEL, 999999) ASC
SELECT REWARD_ITEM_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT, STOCK, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_REWARD_ITEM ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, REWARD_ITEM_ID DESC

SELECT NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST UQ WHERE UQ.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UQ.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS QUEST_DONE, NVL( ( SELECT SUM(NVL(Q.REWARD_EXP, 0)) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST UQ INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST Q ON Q.QUEST_ID = UQ.QUEST_ID WHERE UQ.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UQ.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND UQ.COMPLETED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS GAIN_XP, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE RE WHERE RE.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UPPER(NVL(RE.STATUS, '')) = 'USED' AND RE.USED_AT IS NOT NULL AND RE.USED_AT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND RE.USED_AT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ), 0 ) AS USED_COUPON, NVL( ( SELECT LEAST( 100, GREATEST( 1, ROUND((R.MY_RANK * 100.0) / NULLIF(R.TOTAL_COUNT, 0)) ) ) FROM ( SELECT X.RN AS MY_RANK, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_RANK) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT UR.USER_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UR.TOTAL_EXP DESC, UR.RANK_ID ASC) AS RN FROM LQ_USER_RANK UR ) X WHERE X.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ) R ), 100 ) AS TOP_PERCENT, 0 AS WEEKLY_PROGRESS FROM LQ_USER U WHERE U.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND U.NICKNAME = #{_parameter} AND ROWNUM = 1
